title: West of Broadway
writer: Wallace Smith, Harold Shumate, Jack Cunningham
actors: Priscilla Dean, Arnold Gray, Majel Coleman
plot: When Bruce Elwood, a Wyoming rancher, hears that golf-champion Freddie Hayden is in an area golf tournament, he sends word that he would like Freddie to come teach golf lessons at his Cowboy Golf Club. Upon arriving, and much to t...
